2605.11964.title: Enhancing Target-Guided Proactive Dialogue Systems via Conversational Scenario Modeling and Intent-Keyword Bridging
2605.11964.paper_summary: A target-guided proactive dialogue system aims to steer conversations proactively toward pre-defined targets, such as designated keywords or specific topics. During guided conversations, dynamically modeling conversational scenarios and intent keywords to guide system utterance generation is beneficial; however, existing work largely overlooks this aspect, resulting in a mismatch with the dynamics of real-world conversations. In this paper, we jointly model user profiles and domain knowledge as conversational scenarios to introduce a scenario bias that dynamically influences system utterances, and employ intent-keyword bridging to predict intent keywords for upcoming dialogue turns, providing higher level and more flexible guidance. Extensive automatic and human evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness of conversational scenario modeling and intent keyword bridging, yielding substantial improvements in proactivity, fluency, and informativeness for target-guided proactive dialogue systems, thereby narrowing the gap with real world interactions.
2605.11964.paper_summary_zh: 一個以目標為導向的主動對話系統旨在主動引導對話朝向預先定義的目標，例如指定的關鍵字或特定主題。<lb/>在引導對話過程中，動態建模對話場景和意圖關鍵字以指導系統發話生成是有益的；然而，現有的研究在很大程度上忽視了這一方面，導致與現實世界對話的動態不匹配。<lb/>在本文中，我們將用戶檔案和領域知識共同建模為對話場景，以引入一種動態影響系統發話的場景偏差，並採用意圖關鍵字橋接來預測即將到來的對話輪次的意圖關鍵字，提供更高層次和更靈活的指導。<lb/>廣泛的自動和人工評估證明了對話場景建模和意圖關鍵字橋接的有效性，為以目標為導向的主動對話系統帶來了在主動性、流暢性和信息性方面的顯著提升，從而縮小了與現實世界互動之間的差距。
2605.11964.author: Maodong Li et.al.
2605.11964.authors: Maodong Li, Yancui Li, Fang Kong
